The Heisenberg Estate everything must go

78 pieces · five lots · Albuquerque, 2008–2013 · updated July 2026

Say my name

Breaking Bad, bought carefully. The seized record and the New Mexico that produced it: borosilicate, pork pie felt, hatch green, microfiber. Every link goes straight to the retailer.

Exhibit A · DEA Exhibit B · DEA Exhibit C · DEA Exhibit D · DEA

Catalog of lots

Lot I The Evidence 16 pieces Lot II The Lab 15 pieces Lot III The Wardrobe 17 pieces Lot IV The 505 15 pieces Lot V The Car Wash 15 pieces

The record

Breaking Bad™, AMC, and Sony Pictures Television are trademarks of their respective owners. Lot I is the licensed record. Lots II through V are the world around it, not licensed product.

Prices and stock come from Channel3 and drift like everything else; confirm at the retailer.

The arrangement

Links are monetized. When you buy through one, this site earns a commission. It goes in the barrel.
